### One thing to fix tomorrow  
**Align the bias date with the actual trading date.**  
The bias document is generated for the prior trading day (Friday) and is being read on Saturday, which can cause confusion when reviewing the digest. Ensure that the bias file is either (a) timestamped for the date it applies to and only loaded when the market is open, or (b) clearly marked as “pre‑market bias for the next session” so that weekend reads do not misrepresent the day’s outlook. This will prevent stale bias from being inadvertently interpreted as today’s market view.
